result.stdout:
Usage: RobotRaconteurWebGen [Options+] sources
Generates sources and provides utitilies for the RobotRaconteurWeb library.

Options:
      --thunksource          generate thunk source code
      --version              print program version
      --output-dir=VALUE     directory for output
      --lang=VALUE           language to generate sources for for (only csharp
                               currently supported)
      --import=VALUE         input file for use in imports
      --auto-import          automatically load imported robdef
  -I, --include-path=VALUE   include path
      --outfile=VALUE        unified output file (csharp only)
  -h, --help                 show this message and exit
